name: infra_wiki.ingest
description: Ingest a source file into the Infrastructure Wiki. Creates or updates a wiki page with LLM-generated documentation of the source file, tracking source hashes for staleness detection.

source_file.description: Repo-relative path to the source file (e.g., scripts/run_tests.sh)

summary.description: LLM-generated documentation/summary of the source file

applies_to.description: Environments this applies to (default: dev, test)
